welcomeMessage:
Hi {{givenNameToUse}}, we're reaching out on behalf of the Texas Department of Criminal Justice (TDCJ). You're now subscribed to receive updates about appointments and other items related to your parole.

If you have questions, reach out to Officer {{assignedPoNameToUse}}{{poPhoneNumberAddendum}}.

Standard messaging rates may apply.$t(optOutMessage)
mustBeAtHomeCall: You must be at your home while on the video call.
homeOrVirtualLocation: Your home via virtual video call
virtualLocation: Virtual video call or phone call
languagePreferenceConfirmationMessage: All future messages will be in English.$t(optOutMessage)
optOutMessage:
Si prefiere recibir estos mensajes en español, responda con el número 2 en cualquier momento.

Reply STOP to stop receiving these messages at any time. We're unable to respond to messages sent to this number.
